scope.target: Source repository configuration, downstream target templates, and immutable evidence convention
constraints: Use LF by default with narrow platform exceptions
Preserve only explicitly classified immutable originals byte-for-byte
non_goals: Treat all external evidence as binary

steps: Prove deterministic package and exact upgrades
execution.last_completed_step: Verified source/downstream ownership, centralized evidence policy, immutable packages, clean installation, exact supported upgrades, and target-owned preservation

results.summary: Accepted ADR-001, separated source root configuration from dedicated downstream target-template seeds, centralized immutable-original handling, and proved package and upgrade behavior.
tests_run: four exact supported-source upgrades and target preservation (passed)
package apply suite (24 passed, 1 Windows symlink skipped)
AI-context, workflow, shell-asset, compile, and diff validators (passed)
results.residual_risk: The one exact legacy WorkService evidence exception remains intentionally centralized until a separately authorized stable-path migration exists.
